[CRITICAL] CPU Utilization Trending (Linux) fired — immediate action required

Use case: UC-1.1.1 — CPU Utilization Trending (Linux)

Severity tier: high (urgent)

Immediate action required. Review the firing search, validate impact, and escalate per your runbook.

Detects Linux hosts whose CPU has been pinned above 90% on average for an hour, indicating sustained overload that will cause request queuing and SLA breaches before users notice.

Catalogue link: https://fenre.github.io/splunk-monitoring-use-cases/uc/UC-1.1.1/

Detected at: {timestamp_placeholder}

SPL summary: {spl_summary}
